headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for headings above 32px. Never use generic sans for headings.

body.usage: Clean geometric sans for high legibility in data-heavy tables and forms.

mono.usage: Use for numerical data (metrics, KPIs, IDs, currency) to ensure tabular lining.

colors.guidelines: Color is Function Only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome. Color exists only to guide action. Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Always tint your neutral greys with a tiny bit of blue (cool) or orange (warm).

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing philosophy. Use p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Dense, Data Correlation. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Widget Ratios: Summary (col-span-1), Primary Data (col-span-2 row-span-2), Feed/List (col-span-1 row-span-2). Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.
layout.surfaces: GRID BORDERS (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Container: border-collapse style layout. Items: border-r border-b border-border/40. No heavy shadows. Flat backgrounds.
layout.alignment: Mobile-First. Left-align dense content. Optical alignment over geometrical alignment.

components.cards: Default: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-zinc-200), no shadow. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-md), border color darkens (border-zinc-300).
components.buttons: Primary: Solid bg-blue-600, text-white, hover:bg-blue-700. Secondary: bg-white, border border-zinc-200, text-zinc-900, hover:bg-zinc-50. Ghost: text-zinc-600 hover:bg-zinc-100. Minimum 3:1 contrast against adjacent colors.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Left-align labels. Clear focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500).
components.tables: Dense. Use mono font for numbers. 1px bottom border for rows. Hover state: bg-zinc-50.
components.kanban: Subtle background for columns (bg-zinc-50/50). Cards: bg-white, border-zinc-200, shadow-sm. Dragging state: rotate-2, shadow-lg, border-blue-500.
components.badges: Sharp edges (rounded-sm) or fully pill (rounded-full). Small uppercase text. Use status colors.
components.charts: Recharts. Use monochrome base with primary accent (blue-600). Donut chart for pipeline stages, Bar chart for revenue. Clean tooltips.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-zinc-900
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Must have HIGHER contrast than default state. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none
interactions_and_motion.kanban_drag: Smooth drag and drop animation. Highlight drop zones with a subtle blue tint (bg-blue-50/50 border-blue-200 border-dashed).

icons_and_assets.icon_usage: Duotone weight for high-end look or Regular for technical look. Use for sidebar navigation, action buttons, status indicators.

image_urls.description: Avatar for the logged in user or team members.
Avatar for team members in leaderboard or tasks.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text. Avoid pure transparent backgrounds for text-overlays.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid="login-submit-button", data-testid="kanban-deal-card-123".

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Swiss & High-Contrast Archetype: Use stark white/zinc backgrounds with sharp 1px borders (border-zinc-200) and avoid heavy shadows. Ensure density in the dashboard.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body text. Integrate via Google Fonts or Fontsource.
Implement the Kanban board using @dnd-kit. Ensure smooth drag interactions and drop-zone highlights.
Use Recharts for the Funnel chart and Revenue Bar chart. Keep chart colors constrained to the monochrome palette + primary blue.
Use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons. Install via yarn add @phosphor-icons/react.
Implement data-testid on all interactive elements as requested.
Use Brazilian Portuguese for all UI text.
For the Multi-Company Switcher and Header, use the provided company_logo and user_avatar images.
Role-based UI: Display 'MASTER' badge or 'ADMIN' badge prominently next to user info or company name.
